justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly identified "next Friday" as June 5th, but the user also specified "around 9 AM" which the agent did not explicitly acknowledge or prioritize when offering slots.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent successfully offered available slots for the requested day when the user's preferred time was unavailable.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently gathered all necessary information in the first turn and booked the appointment in the second turn without any unnecessary exchanges.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent quickly understanding the request and providing clear options.
